name: Agent Pack
description: Pure mechanism for pulling AI-agent customisation packs (skills, slash commands, persona/instructions, hooks, MCP server configs, helper scripts, sub-agents, arbitrary files) from any git repo at deploy time and mounting them into the agent container. Templates can rely on common-layout auto-detection or provide exact mounts for unusual repositories.

fields.label: Git Token (HTTPS)
fields.description: Optional personal access token for private agent-pack repositories

packs.description: Agent packs to mount into the container

id.description: Unique pack id within the agent (used for mount subdir). Auto-derived from url when omitted.

ref.description: Branch, tag, or commit SHA. Defaults to 'main'.

autoDetect.description: Auto-detect common pack layouts (skills/, .claude/commands, .claude/agents, openclaw/skills, hooks, MCP, scripts, context docs). Defaults to true when mounts are omitted.

mounts.description: Per-kind mount declarations. Optional when autoDetect is enabled; use this for custom repo layouts.

kind.description: Kind of artifact this mount contributes.

from.description: Source path inside the cloned repo. Use '.' for repo root.

include.description: Optional whitelist of immediate child names to copy.

instructionFiles.description: Override the curated root-level instruction filenames (default: CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, SOUL.md, RULES.md, ETHOS.md, INSTRUCTIONS.md, PERSONALITY.md, README.md).

tokenSecret.description: K8s secret name (or ${env:VAR}) for HTTPS token

sshKeySecret.description: K8s secret name for SSH private key

mountPath.description: Container path where pack subdirs are mounted

poll.description: Optional poll interval (e.g. '5m', '30s', '1h') for live refresh sidecar. Omit to disable.
